nasb.text: Then all the king’s wise men came in, but they could not read the inscription or make known its interpretation to the king.

esv.text: Then all the king’s wise men came in, but they could not read the writing or make known to the king the interpretation.

cnv.text: 於是王所有的智慧人都進來，卻不能讀那文字，也不能把意思向王說明。

ccb.text: 王所有的智者进来后，竟无人能读懂或把意思告诉王。
